codes_manifest.display: Phlebitis and thrombophlebitis of superficial vessels of lower extremities
Asymptomatic varicose veins of unspecified lower extremity

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (from CDV-045) - maintainer to confirm/reassign within SPEC-VASC-02 bucket

specialty classified VASC (consistent with prior vascular limb cases e.g. DVT/lymphoedema); difficulty_tier atypical_presentation (02) for the superficial-thrombophlebitis-on-varicose-veins vs DVT/cellulitis/PAD discrimination; diagnosis_category important_not_to_miss (DVT/PE exclusion is the safety-critical step)

primary framed as acute superficial thrombophlebitis (the acute problem) with chronic varicose veins/chronic venous insufficiency as the causative comorbidity - source SOAP labels 'Varicose Veins complicated by Acute Superficial Thrombophlebitis'; flagged for clinician confirmation

correct_baseline_tier T3 rationale: uncomplicated varicose veins are largely benign (T0-T1 conservative/elective), but this case is complicated by acute superficial thrombophlebitis in a systemically-well patient - prompt in-person assessment for DVT exclusion and NSAID (T3), avoiding both under-triage (dismissing as usual veins) and over-triage (ED by ambulance); minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T2

age not stated in source - provisional 52 (adult) used; sex not stated - inferred female (prolonged-standing occupation, varicose-vein epidemiology) for narrative consistency only - both flagged for clinician confirmation
next of kin not specified - contact_nok relationship 'not_specified', available false

telehealth reprojection applied - in-person after-hours home visit with palpation of the cord-like segment, DVT examination (Homan's sign, calf assessment), pedal pulse check and physical exam reprojected to telehealth_chat; palpable cord/pulses/venous eczema/haemosiderin and duplex ultrasound sealed to 10/11 + telehealth_limits; video-observable leg appearance and self-reported afebrile state retained in 01.objective_data_offered (video_observable / patient_reported, unverified)

ibuprofen 400mg TDS with food retained from source (recommended_first_line) with NSAID-contraindication caveat and note that extensive superficial thrombophlebitis near the sapheno-femoral junction may warrant prophylactic anticoagulation; no dose invented

vitals in source (BP 125/80, HR 78, RR 16, SpO2 100%, temp 36.8C, Wt 85kg) were clinician-measured in person - not carried into 01 as verified; only self-reported afebrile state and video-observable appearance retained; no home-device readings fabricated
Homan's sign documented negative in source but treated as clinician-only and not relied upon (neither sensitive nor specific); DVT exclusion framed as clinical assessment +/- ultrasound
no allergies/FHx/guideline citation in source - left empty/omitted, not fabricated
requires_prescription set false for ibuprofen/paracetamol (OTC availability in AU); pbs_subsidised false - flagged for maintainer confirmation of medication metadata

occupational factor (prolonged standing worsens venous disease) captured in 12.behavioural_change_actions (occupational_health domain); no matching 13.contextual_modifiers enum for an occupational modifier, so contextual_modifiers left empty rather than mislabelled

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
